titleStmt.title: SII 15.120: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 120. (B.K. No. 56 of 1926-27.) HARTI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the temple of Īśvara.
This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Vijaya, Kārttika-puṇṇame, Monday, corresponding to 1173 A.D., October 22.

It records the gift of the pannāya tax on the god's garden for offerings to the god Yīgoydēśvara, by the Twelve Gāvuṇḍas of Harati, Aṟuvattokkalu, the Three Hundred of Ugura, and the Thousand in conjunction with Baḷēśvara and Heggaḍe Chauḍamayyanāyaka of Kāḍilūru, after washing the feet of Jātavēda-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cā
ravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhā mūlastambhāya
sambhavē . koḍadinudiyisidagastyaṁ kaḍa
laṁ pī¨rvvante maṁḍaḷēśvararājyakkoḍeya
nene puṭṭi bijjalaneḍegoṁḍaṁ sā¨rvvabhaumapa
davī śrīya . Ogedō¨rvvaṁ neṟeviṭṭu śātravatama
stōmaṁ samanteyda meydegevannaṁ suvidhēyabhūpacaya
cētaścātakaṁ na¨rttisalu bagevannaṁ kumuda¨rkkala¨rkkavoge
vennaṁ tīvidattāvagaṁ jagamaṁ rāyamurāri sō
manṛpanudyatkī[¨rtti*] caṁdrātapa . Ā rāyamurāri
padāṁbhōruhasēvātilōla cētōbhriṁgaṁ sāragu
ṇagaṇanidhānanapārayaśaṁ dhanyadaṇḍanāthaṁ negaḷda . Ā
vaneṇe daṇḍanāthara dēvaṁge samagra samarasamma¨rddada
daśagrīvaṁge bageye mallugidēvaṁge payōdhi pari
vritō¨rvvītaḷadoḷu . svasti śrīmatu kaḷaca¨ryya bhuja
baḷa cakrava¨rtti rāyamurāri sōyidēvava¨rṣa
da 7 neya vijaya saṁvatsarada kā¨rttikasuddha puṇṇami sōmavā
ra vyatīpāta saṁkrānti saṁyōga rūḍha puṇyadinado
ḷu śrīmatu harati hanni¨rbba¨rggāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ Aṟuva
ttūkkaluṁ Uguramūnū¨rvvaruṁ sāsi¨rvvaruṁ mukhyavāgi
baḷēsvaradēvanuṁ paṁnāyada heggaḍe kāḍilūra cauḍamayya nāya
karu śrī yīgoydēsvaradēvarācā¨ryya¨rjjātavēdapaṇḍitara
kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi dēvara tō
ṭada paṁnnāyamaṁ sa¨rvvanamaśyavāgi dēvara nivēdya
kke biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
